footer.description: Solid Distributed Systems SRL provides IT services and AI solutions, specializing in cloud, platform engineering, automation, and AI integration.
footer.copyright: Copyright reserved by Solid Distributed Systems SRL - 2026

about.subtitle: Wisdom in code. Built to last.
about.heading: Foundations that outlast their builders.
about.text: EU-native cloud and AI infrastructure. Fixed prices. Senior delivery. AWS, Azure, or sovereign EU providers — your choice. GDPR by default. One senior engineer, published scope, published price, 30-day warranty.

aboutPage.subtitle: About Our Company
aboutPage.heading: Senior execution for modern infrastructure and AI
aboutPage.openingText: The old wizards of the Arthurian world weren't magicians. They were elders who had seen enough kingdoms rise and fall to know which foundations would hold. They advised kings, drew the maps, and stayed long after the celebrations ended. That's the work this company does — for the cloud, not for kingdoms.
aboutPage.coreDescription: Solid Distributed Systems is a Romanian senior cloud and AI infrastructure practice. We sell fixed-price packages with published scope, published prices, and published timelines. No vague retainers, no "we'll send a custom quote", no junior engineers learning on your account. One senior practitioner, two decades of production scars, and a delivery library refined across forty-plus projects from EU Commission systems to fintech platforms to AI agent backends.
aboutPage.whyOption1Text: They'll send a team, charge you €40,000–100,000 for the same outcome, and assign a senior architect who shows up to the kickoff and the closeout while juniors do the middle.
aboutPage.whyOption2Text: With two strong cloud engineers and six weeks of runway, you absolutely can. We'll tell you when this is the right answer. But most teams underestimate what comes after "it works": IAM scoped correctly, KMS keys rotating, GDPR documentation defensible under audit, the exit runbook the regulator now requires. That tail is where months disappear.
aboutPage.whyOption3Heading: Buy a finished package from us
aboutPage.whyOption3Text: Two weeks, one senior, fixed price, written warranty. The same engineer who wrote the Terraform answers the phone when something breaks in month three.
aboutPage.whatDrivesText: The cloud consulting market is stuck between two bad options: white-glove firms that price out anyone below the Fortune 1000, and bargain freelance marketplaces that produce infrastructure no one wants to inherit. The middle — senior, fast, fixed-price, accountable — was missing. We believe European companies should be able to buy production-grade cloud foundations the way they buy a laptop: known specifications, known price, known delivery date, known warranty.
aboutPage.missionText: To deliver European businesses cloud and AI infrastructure that is correct, compliant, and durable — at prices small and mid-sized companies can actually approve, in timelines short enough that the project stays a project instead of becoming a quarterly initiative.
aboutPage.howWeWorkStep1: You pick a package and pay the deposit. Within one business day you receive a short intake form. A 30-minute kickoff call follows within three business days.
aboutPage.howWeWorkStep2: Delivery runs against the published timeline. Daily commits in a private repo, written updates twice a week. Problems escalated immediately.
aboutPage.howWeWorkStep3: Handover is a working session — not a document drop. You receive code, documentation, diagrams, credentials, and runbooks. Thirty days of warranty follow.
aboutPage.howWeWorkNote: We work with three to four clients at a time, never more. That cap is what makes the timelines real.
aboutPage.aiText1: We use Claude, Copilot, and a private library of internal MCP servers and prompts throughout delivery — generating first-draft Terraform from specifications, summarising intake forms, drafting documentation, reviewing code, producing reports from CLI output. This is part of why our prices are lower than traditional boutiques.
aboutPage.aiText2: What AI does not do is make the architectural decision. It will happily build you an EKS cluster you did not need, a serverless stack that ignores a regulatory constraint, or a RAG pipeline whose costs spiral in week three. The judgment about what to build, what to refuse to build, and what will survive your specific environment is what you are paying for. The code is the easy part now. The choices are not.
aboutPage.whereWeWorkText: AWS and Azure as primary clouds. OVHcloud, Hetzner, Scaleway, and Exoscale for clients whose compliance posture favors non-American infrastructure. AWS European Sovereign Cloud and Azure EU Data Boundary when those are the right answer. GDPR, NIS2, and DORA are built into every deliverable — not added afterwards.
aboutPage.whoWeAreText: Solid Distributed Systems SRL is a Romanian company founded by Cosmin Banciu — senior cloud and DevOps engineer with twenty years of experience including platform engineering at the European Commission, lead DevOps at Aily Labs, and infrastructure roles for Volkswagen, Lego, Cisco, WIPO, BMW, and IBM. AWS Solutions Architect Professional and Azure Fundamentals certified. Headquartered in Râșnov, Brașov. Deliberately small. Intending to stay that way.
aboutPage.closingQuote: Merlin built his foundations before the kingdom existed. He stayed long after the kings did. That's the standard.

services.subtitle: Our Offerings
services.heading: IT consultancy and AI-ready data products
services.text: Built for serious buyers: senior-led IT consultancy in clear service tiers, plus ADR, our curated data platform for AI systems.
services.service1Text: High-seniority consultancy packages covering architecture, DevOps, cloud platforms, automation, reliability, and delivery strategy.
services.service2Text: Curated, up-to-date data products for AI systems, delivered with MCP connectivity and API access for production use.
services.service3Text: Engagements can be structured in clear service tiers so clients can choose the right depth of support and execution.
services.service4Text: ADR is designed for direct integration into AI workflows through managed MCP endpoints and traditional API consumption.
services.ctaHeading: Ready to modernize your stack or power your AI systems?
services.ctaText: Talk to Solid Distributed Systems about advanced consultancy packages or ADR access.

servicesPage.subtitle: What we offer
servicesPage.heading: IT consultancy and AI Services
servicesPage.text: Access the pages below to send us a request and get your customized offer.
servicesPage.itText: Senior-led consulting covering cloud platforms, DevOps, platform engineering, Kubernetes, automation, and security. Structured as tiered packages so clients choose the right depth of advisory, implementation, and ongoing support.
servicesPage.aiText: AI solutions tailored to your business, from custom AI workflows and agent integrations to ADR (AI Data Refinery) — a curated, continuously updated data platform designed for AI systems. Delivered with MCP connectivity and API access for direct integration into LLM tools, copilots, and internal AI platforms.

team.teamTitle: Senior specialists in platform, cloud, and AI delivery
team.teamText1: A high-seniority delivery team built for complex infrastructure, resilient platforms, and AI-ready data systems.
team.teamText2: We help organizations modernize architecture, improve delivery performance, strengthen operational reliability, and build trustworthy data flows for AI systems. Our work combines strategic consulting with hands-on execution.
team.skill2: Platform engineering, Kubernetes, GitOps, and automation
team.skill4: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and Terragrunt
team.skill6: Data delivery patterns for AI systems, including MCP and API integration
team.skill7: Cloudflare, observability stacks, and production operations
team.skill8: Infrastructure planning, migration, and modernization programs
team.engagement1: Design and scale modern cloud and platform foundations
team.engagement2: Build and improve CI/CD, GitOps, and release processes
team.engagement3: Develop Infrastructure as Code and operational automation
team.engagement4: Improve reliability, scalability, cost control, and security posture
team.engagement5: Support architecture transformation and platform modernization
team.engagement6: Deliver curated, maintained data access layers for AI use cases
team.engagement7: Design AI-ready, future-proof systems that can evolve with new tools, models, and operating demands

homeTiers.subtitle: 13 packages across 4 tiers
homeTiers.heading: What we build
homeTiers.infraText: EU-compliant cloud foundations, DORA-ready setups, and multi-region disaster recovery. Delivered on AWS, Azure, or sovereign EU providers.
homeTiers.aiText: Production-ready LLM stacks, GDPR-compliant RAG, MCP servers, AI agent hardening, and on-prem AI sandboxes. EU data residency by default.
homeTiers.retainerText: Fractional senior platform engineering and AI platform care on a monthly basis. Cancel with 30 days notice.

packagesPage.subtitle: Fixed prices. Published scope.
packagesPage.heading: Packages
packagesPage.intro: All packages include a 30-day warranty. Prices are fixed — no change orders, no scope creep. Packages above €3,000 require a 30-minute pre-sale call.
packagesPage.wipNote: Current availability: 3 active packages + 3 retainers max. We publish this because it signals quality, not shortage.
packagesPage.noResults: No packages match the selected filters.
packagesPage.preSaleNote: Packages above €3,000 require a 30-minute pre-sale call. Payment by Stripe invoice or bank transfer.

procurement.subtitle: Vendor Information
procurement.heading: For Procurement Teams
procurement.intro: Everything your procurement team needs to onboard us as a vendor — company details, legal templates, a pre-answered security questionnaire, and insurance information. Most enterprise sales cycles add two to four weeks just gathering this. It is all here.
procurement.company_addressValue: Str. Brașovului 17, Râșnov, Jud. Brașov, Romania
procurement.docsIntro: Available on request at cosbanciu@soliddistributedsystems.io. Typical turnaround: one business day.
procurement.doc_msaText: Standard B2B services agreement covering scope, IP assignment, liability cap (limited to contract value), governing law (Romanian), and dispute resolution. Available in English and Romanian.
procurement.doc_dpaText: GDPR-compliant DPA under Article 28. Covers processing purposes, data subject categories, sub-processor list, technical and organisational measures, and data transfer mechanisms for EU/EEA.
procurement.doc_refundText: 100% refund if we withdraw. 50% refund if client withdraws after kickoff. 30-day post-delivery warranty on all packages. Published and contractually binding.
procurement.docRequestNote: Request via email — available within one business day.
procurement.secQIntro: Pre-answered to cover the most common enterprise information security questionnaire items. For custom questionnaires, allow two business days.
procurement.secQ1Question: Do you process client data on your systems?
procurement.secQ1Answer: Only data explicitly provided during the engagement (intake forms, access credentials). All data is handled within EU boundaries. Credentials are stored in 1Password Teams with role-based access. No client data is retained after engagement close unless contractually agreed.
procurement.secQ2Question: What cloud infrastructure do you use for delivery work?
procurement.secQ2Answer: AWS eu-central-1 (Frankfurt) for our own tooling and automation. Client-side work is performed directly within the client's own AWS/Azure/sovereign EU accounts — we do not proxy client data through our infrastructure.
procurement.secQ3Question: How do you handle access credentials provided by clients?
procurement.secQ3Answer: Credentials are stored in 1Password Teams with audit logging. Access is scoped to minimum required. Credentials are rotated or revoked at engagement close. We do not share credentials with sub-contractors; all delivery is performed by the named senior engineer.
procurement.secQ4Question: Do you use sub-contractors or offshore resources?
procurement.secQ4Answer: No. All delivery is performed by Cosmin Banciu, the founding senior engineer. No juniors, no sub-contractors, no offshore. This is a structural guarantee, not a policy.
procurement.secQ5Question: What is your GDPR compliance posture?
procurement.secQ5Answer: We are a Romanian SRL operating within the EU/EEA. We operate as a Data Processor under Article 28 where applicable. A signed DPA is available before engagement start. All AI tooling used in delivery (Claude, Copilot) runs under EU data residency settings where available.
procurement.secQ6Answer: AWS Solutions Architect Professional (active). Azure Fundamentals (active). GDPR and NIS2 awareness training completed. ISO 27001 certification is not held; for engagements that require it, we can work within a client's certified environment under their ISMS.
procurement.insuranceText: Professional indemnity insurance is in place. Certificate of insurance available on request. Liability is capped at the total contract value in the MSA. For engagements requiring higher coverage, contact us before signing.
procurement.ctaText: Send us your vendor onboarding form or security questionnaire and we will return it completed within two business days.

howWeWork.processHeading: Five steps from deposit to handover
howWeWork.processIntro: Every engagement follows the same structure. No surprises, no scope creep, no disappearing acts.
howWeWork.step1Text: Browse the packages page, choose what fits, and pay the deposit. Fixed price, fixed scope, fixed timeline — no negotiation required.
howWeWork.step2Text: Within one business day you receive a short intake form. A 30-minute kickoff call follows within three business days. We align on access, tooling, and first deliverables.
howWeWork.step3Text: Daily commits in a private repo. Written progress updates twice a week. Any blocker is escalated immediately — we do not wait for a status meeting.
howWeWork.step4Text: At the midpoint and end of delivery you review the work. Feedback is incorporated. Nothing is signed off until you are satisfied.
howWeWork.step5Text: A working session, not a document drop. You receive code, documentation, diagrams, credentials, and runbooks. Thirty days of warranty follow.
howWeWork.wipNote: We work with three to four clients at a time, never more. That cap is what makes the timelines real.
howWeWork.aiHeading: How we use AI in delivery
howWeWork.aiDoes2: Summarise intake forms and produce structured briefs
howWeWork.aiDoes3: Draft documentation, runbooks, and architecture diagrams
howWeWork.aiDoes4: Review code and produce reports from CLI output
howWeWork.aiPriceNote: This is part of why our prices are lower than traditional boutiques. AI handles the mechanical work; senior judgment handles the choices.
howWeWork.aiDoesNotText: AI does not make architectural decisions. It will happily build you an EKS cluster you did not need, a serverless stack that ignores a regulatory constraint, or a RAG pipeline whose costs spiral in week three. The judgment about what to build, what to refuse to build, and what will survive your specific environment is what you are paying for. The code is the easy part now. The choices are not.
howWeWork.buildBuyIntro: When you should build it yourself, when you should hire a large firm, and when buying a fixed-price package is the right call.
howWeWork.buildCol1Text: Right when your team has two strong cloud engineers, six weeks of runway, and no regulatory tail. We will tell you when this is your answer. Most teams underestimate the tail: IAM scoped correctly, KMS keys rotating, GDPR documentation defensible under audit, the exit runbook the regulator now requires.
howWeWork.buildCol2Text: Right when you need a named vendor for procurement, have a budget above €50k, and can absorb a four-to-six week sales cycle. You will get a senior architect at kickoff and closeout. Juniors do the middle. Prices start at €40,000.
howWeWork.buildCol3Text: Right when you need the outcome, not the discovery process. Fixed price, fixed scope, fixed timeline. The same engineer who wrote the Terraform answers the phone when something breaks in month three. Prices start at €2,900.
